name: bawsala-study-toolkit-v16
description: Bawsala Study OS v16 continuity release: one cross-page study journey, atomic backend transactions, contextual actions, truthful sync state, and end-to-end UX validation.

scripts.release:check: node tools/build-assets.mjs && node tools/release-check.mjs && node tools/frontend-functional-runtime.mjs && node tools/http-browser-e2e.mjs && node tools/production-hardening-tests.mjs && node tools/server-smoke.mjs
scripts.check:all: node tools/build-assets.mjs && node tools/generate-openapi.mjs && node tools/check.mjs && node tools/unit-tests.mjs && node tools/timezone-tests.mjs && node tools/study-engine-tests.mjs && node tools/study-domain-tests.mjs && node tools/study-journey-tests.mjs && node tools/data-integrity-tests.mjs && node tools/backend-architecture-tests.mjs && node tools/security-unit-tests.mjs && node tools/deep-audit.mjs && node tools/css-cascade-audit.mjs && node tools/frontend-experience-tests.mjs && node tools/frontend-innovation-tests.mjs && node tools/quality-gates.mjs && node tools/performance-budget.mjs && node tools/browser-flow-smoke.mjs && node tools/frontend-functional-runtime.mjs && node tools/http-browser-e2e.mjs && node tools/launch-readiness-tests.mjs && node tools/production-upgrade-smoke.mjs && node tools/stage-9-readiness.mjs && node tools/stage-10-final-audit.mjs && node tools/security-regression.mjs && node tools/production-hardening-tests.mjs && node tools/server-smoke.mjs && node tools/release-check.mjs
scripts.test: node tools/unit-tests.mjs && node tools/timezone-tests.mjs && node tools/study-engine-tests.mjs && node tools/study-domain-tests.mjs && node tools/study-journey-tests.mjs && node tools/backend-architecture-tests.mjs && node tools/data-integrity-tests.mjs
scripts.test:unit: node tools/unit-tests.mjs && node tools/timezone-tests.mjs && node tools/study-engine-tests.mjs && node tools/study-domain-tests.mjs && node tools/study-journey-tests.mjs && node tools/backend-architecture-tests.mjs && node tools/data-integrity-tests.mjs
scripts.test:security: node tools/security-unit-tests.mjs && node tools/security-regression.mjs && node tools/production-hardening-tests.mjs && node tools/stage-9-readiness.mjs && npm audit --audit-level=high --omit=dev
scripts.test:frontend: node tools/build-assets.mjs && node tools/frontend-experience-tests.mjs && node tools/frontend-innovation-tests.mjs && node tools/css-cascade-audit.mjs && node tools/performance-budget.mjs && node tools/browser-flow-smoke.mjs && node tools/frontend-functional-runtime.mjs && node tools/http-browser-e2e.mjs && node tools/launch-readiness-tests.mjs
